message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This is the cover page of an installation and operation manual for a TICA brand modular air-cooled chiller (heat pump). The page displays the manual title in both English and Chinese, the equipment type, and the manufacturer's logo.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "INSTALLATION & OPERATION MANUAL"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "MODULAR AIR-COOLED CHILLER (HEAT PUMP)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "安装操作手册"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "模块化风冷式冷（热）水机组-D"},
    {"type": "logo", "label": "TICA 天加中央空调"},
    {"type": "watermark", "label": "制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["manual_identification", "equipment_model", "manufacturer"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "INSTALLATION & OPERATION MANUAL\n安装操作手册\nMODULAR AIR-COOLED CHILLER (HEAT PUMP)\n模块化风冷式冷（热）水机组-D\nTICA 天加中央空调\n制冷百家网: www.zhilengbj.cn",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The specific model series is indicated as '-D' in the Chinese text. The watermark is from a third-party website, not the original manual.",
  "confidence": 1.0
}
